title: Companionship Makes the World Sparkle; Even the Darkest of Paths can Shine like Gold

text_block_list.text: On a day before a rest day during the summer training camp, I was talking with Stay Gold about our plans the next day.
choice_data_list: We got the OK for the campground.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Oh. That's good to hear. 
Man, this sure got interesting.
First, in the afternoon we'll hike, then at night we'll stargaze while eating… After that, we'll go wherever our feet take us.
choice_data_list: Roger that, looking forward to it!
Roger that, looking forward to it!
text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Mmmmm～ Hah… 
…Such a nice breeze.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Let's get a move on. 
I wonder where the wind is blowing to.
Following our schedule, we spent the morning hiking up the mountain at our own pace. On this journey, I saw something that interested me.
choice_data_list: —Hey, Stego! You got a moment?
—Hey, Stego! You got a moment?

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Yeah?
As she turned her head back to look in my direction, I showed her a round black fruit that I found. If what I learnt during this hiking trip, then this is—

That's… a soapberry. 
It's a fruit you use as a soap.
text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
choice_data_list: I knew it! I've wanted to try one～
I knew it! I've wanted to try one～

text_block_list.text: Soapberry, as the name suggests, is a fruit that foams when its skin is rubbed with water. I didn't think that I would be able to get my hands on the real thing.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Well, shall we go then… to the river? 
Since we have it, I wonder if there's enough to wash my hair?
choice_data_list: Yeah! Let's do it!
Yeah! Let's do it!

text_block_list.text: And we now arrived at the riverbank—
choice_data_list: Hey, anywhere else that needs to be washed～?

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! 
No, I'm all good! Thanks!

I was planning on washing my hair on my own, but… 
It was unexpectedly quite difficult to do it myself so we're now washing each other's heads.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Phew～ It's been a while since someone's washed my hair. 
Feeling nice and refreshed.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Alright, time to switch. 
You ready?
choice_data_list: I-I think so…
I-I think so…

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, just leave it to me. 
I'll make it look heavenly!
While our hair was drying, I was treated to a brief performance. I started to clap my hands without realizing. It feels like a waste that there was no one else to witness that performance.
choice_data_list: Time for me to perform too.
Time for me to perform too.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Oh? 
…An ocarina?
choice_data_list: Yeah, it seemed interesting so I bought one.
Yeah, it seemed interesting so I bought one.

text_block_list.text:
My original plan was to learn the harmonica, but… 
When I heard that simple sound of an ocarina, I was immediately charmed and when I came to I had bought one.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
So that's how you got one. 
…Well, are you going to play it?
With a light grin and a nod to those words, I brought the ocarina up and lightly blew into it.
(Fooo Pyooo Fyooo)

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: …Pft—

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Ahahaha! What was that? 
You're still just a little chick!
choice_data_list: It was an impulse buy… It's pretty difficult…

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Heh, ahaha! 
I get it, I get it.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Anyways, just try blowing into it. 
If you try it, it'll come naturally.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
As long as it's fun, that's all that matters. 
It's music that doesn't require much thought.
The quiet moment we had quickly melted away as the sky began to turn into a warm red before we noticed.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
I prepared it a bit too early, huh. 
Still have a while to go before our stargazing meal.
choice_data_list: Well, it should be fine if we start now, right?

text_block_list.text: It was a wild meal with a pleasant breeze and the sounds of the waves. I had a feeling this was going to be a wonderful night and my chest swelled in anticipation.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
…Yeah, it looks like that's the case too. 
Anyways, shall we toast?

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: To today's journey!
choice_data_list: To today's journey!

text_block_list.text: "Cheers!" with that said, our glasses clinked into each other.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Oh?… The air smells different now. 
Here it comes.
choice_data_list: What?

text_block_list.text: (Drip)
(Fwoosh!)
choice_data_list: A-An evening shower!?

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Oh boy… This isn't good. 
Everything's gonna get wet.
choice_data_list: The meat… the fish… our stargazing dinner…

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
There's no helping it. This is god's decree. 
Looks like they're gonna be hogging the night sky.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: At any rate… Heh.
choice_data_list: …Heheh.

text_block_list.text:
Ahahaha! It's impressive how 
bad this turned out!
text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
choice_data_list: Haha! Yeah it really is just the worst!
Haha! Yeah it really is just the worst!

text_block_list.text:
In a moment, everything had spiraled into chaos. 
And yet, it just made everything more interesting.
choice_data_list: Right! Wait right here!

text_block_list.text:
With that said I headed out, diving into the heavy rainfall… 
I came back with something that was laying next to the bonfire.
choice_data_list: We might as well make the best of the worst!

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Haha, you actually got it! 
Sounds good… I'm in!

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Mmm, oh yeah that's bad! 
It's way too soggy.
choice_data_list: Haha! But it's not that bad.
Haha! But it's not that bad.

text_block_list.text:
It's watery, cold, and not really that tasty. 
And yet I couldn't stop myself from continuing to eat it.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: —It's really pouring out there.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
…Do you remember? 
It was raining just like this when we first met.
choice_data_list: Yeah it was. We're always unlucky.
Yeah it was. We're always unlucky.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, it might be unlucky. 
But it also might not be unlucky.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Rain tends to bring 
about novel things.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Whether it be a blessing… 
Or a curse.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Sometimes it would bring sadness, 
and other times it would wash it away.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: As well as…
choice_data_list: As well as?

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
…As well as this. Instead of concealing the stars, 
it would reveal a wonderful friend.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
It can bring along a beloved friend, 
who laughs and enjoys the sudden rainfall.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Well, wouldn't you agree?
